title: Valid Parentheses
statement: Given a string s containing only the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the string is valid. Brackets must be closed by the same type and in the correct order.

steps.description: Recognize matching is LIFO: the most recently opened bracket must close first.
Identify a stack as the natural fit for LIFO matching.
Decide the algorithm: push openers, on each closer pop and verify the popped opener matches.
Handle the empty-stack-on-close edge case (e.g. ')' as the first character) - that's invalid.
Handle the non-empty-stack-at-end edge case (unclosed openers like '((') - also invalid.
State complexity: O(n) time, O(n) space.
